response.overview: Madelein Murphy has been performing stand-up comedy for over a decade and has the stories to prove it. In her debut special, she covers topics ranging from lesbian dating, family, her mom's church friends who are all named Susan, nannying, and the time a cop thought her legal name was Muddin. Filmed in front of a live and raucous audience in her hometown of Rochester NY, this special weaves together crowd work and storytelling for an hour of nonstop laughs.
response.title: Madelein Murphy: Muddin'
